creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Michael from comment #2)
Thanks for confirming it. Then this sounds highly possible due to an issue in Mellanox driver on Windows. Although there might be chance that an issue has been revealed by the newer driver, it still worth to contact Microsoft and Mellanox for this issue.  Not sure if they will ask you to check other OS as Hyper-V guest, but if this is also reproducible on other OSes, it may increase the visibility of this issue.
